CustomField.description: Select the origin of the Invoice Settings for Assignments related to this Contract. Choose 'Contract' if the settings should be specific to this Contract, or 'Account' if the settings should be inherited from the related Account. If 'Contract' is selected, the system will automatically create Invoice Settings related to this Contract.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the origin of the Invoice Settings for Assignments related to this Contract. Choose 'Contract' if the settings should be specific to this Contract, or 'Account' if the settings should be inherited from the related Account. If 'Contract' is selected, the system will automatically create Invoice Settings related to this Contract.
CustomField.label: Invoice Settings Source
